title: DFU - Emu/Tern - Charge Case update needed popup after earbud DFU
scenario: Post-DFU popup incorrectly directs users to Poly Lens Desktop for case update instead of in-app case update on Device Home Screen
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
3. Ensure both the earbuds and the charge case are on outdated firmware.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the earbuds via the app.
5. Wait for the DFU to complete successfully.
6. After the update completes, observe the Device Home Screen.
7. Check for any popup displayed at the bottom of the screen.
expected: After the DFU completes, the Device Home Screen should display a popup at the bottom stating: "Case Update Needed: Earbuds have been updated, updates to your case must be made using Poly Lens Desktop app."
